note: Mathlib/Analysis/Complex/Circle.lean:49-50: `/-- The unit circle in `ℂ`. -/ def Circle : Type := Submonoid.unitSphere ℂ`. File docstring: 'This file defines `Circle` to be the metric sphere (`Metric.sphere`) in `ℂ` centred at `0` of radius `1`.' Direct formalization of the unit circle, equipped as a CommGroup/topological group.

Mathlib/Data/Finite/Defs.lean:205-206: `protected def Infinite (s : Set α) : Prop := ¬s.Finite` (docstring: 'A set is infinite if it is not finite.'). This is the canonical `Set.Infinite` predicate, the direct formalization of 'infinite set'.

Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus/FDeriv/Defs.lean: `HasFDerivAt f f' x := HasFDerivWithinAt f f' x univ`, defined via the little-o condition `f y - f x - f' (y - x) = o(y - x)` — i.e. f' is exactly the linear map that best approximates f near x. Generalizes the elementary single/multi-variable 'linear approximation' (tangent line/plane) to Fréchet derivatives on normed spaces; specializes correctly to it.

Field-level container: Mathlib/Algebra (52,510 decls) is the formal home for algebraic structures (groups, rings, modules, fields substructure, monoids, etc.) — the concept 'algebraic structure' names exactly this class of objects. Path verified as key libraries.Mathlib.modules.Algebra in catalog/data/hierarchy.json.

Field-level container: Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus (4,084 decls) holds FDeriv (Fréchet/multivariable derivative), Gradient/, ImplicitFunction/, LagrangeMultipliers.lean, VectorField.lean, TangentCone/ — the multivariable-calculus machinery, alongside some single-variable content (Deriv/, MeanValue.lean). Best available formal home for the field; medium confidence since not exclusively multivariable. Path verified as key libraries.Mathlib.modules.Analysis.sub.Calculus in catalog/data/hierarchy.json.
